expertises.name: HardLine - General consumer goods and accessories

actions.instructions: Please provide a picture of the inspector in front of the factory gate.

zh.instructions: 请提供一张验货员在工厂大门前的照片。

actions.instructions:
1. Please add/take those pictures inside the generic picture section (Toolbox (top right corner) > Camera): Factory Front Gate / Inspector in front of factory / Warehouse / Finished and Packed products / Finished but not packed / Semi-finished products / Total carton selected / Total pieces selected / All defectives pieces / Factory disclaimer / COC / (Draft Report - Optional)

2. Contact QIMA quality team if the inspection is performed in the warehouse which does not belong to the factory or the supplier. If goods at another location (belongs to the supplier) no more than 5-15 mins by walking - still proceed with the inspection and reflect the location in the report and notify the back office. 

3. All defects must be clearly documented and photographed in the report. If no defects are found, note "No defect found" in the report; do not leave it blank.

4. Please put the picture by SKU by color which means that if there are 2 color of 1 SKU, you will need to put 2 picture in this section.

5.Please use TAG feature in QIMAone to organize photos with captions per SKU. 
Please see this video link tutorial: https://www.loom.com/share/8ba5648b963740f79fffcc754f524edd

zh.instructions:
1. 请在通用图片部分（工具箱（右上角）> 相机）：工厂正门 / 验货员在工厂前 / 仓库 / 完成并包装的产品 / 完成但未包装 / 半成品 / 总抽箱数量 / 总抽样数量 / 所有缺陷产品 / 工厂免责声明 / COC / （草稿报告 - 可选）中添加/拍摄这些图片。
2. 如果验货在不属于工厂或供应商的仓库进行，请联系QIMA质量团队。如果货物在另一个地点（属于供应商），步行不超过5-15分钟 - 仍然继续进行验货，并在报告中反映该位置并通知办公室。
3. 所有缺陷必须在报告中清晰记录并拍照。如果没有发现缺陷，请在报告中注明“未发现缺陷”；不要留空。
4. 请按颜色将图片按SKU放置，这意味着如果1个SKU有2种颜色，您需要在此部分放置2张图片。
5. 请在QIMAone中使用TAG功能为每个SKU组织带有标题的照片。
请查看此视频链接教程：https://www.loom.com/share/8ba5648b963740f79fffcc754f524edd

elements.instruction:
Please input the total quantity finished and packed in pcs and %, the total quantity finished and unpacked in pcs and %.
If products are not ready for inspection:
      - Check the available product and semi-finished product and ask the factory to provide the packing material if available. 
      - Marked inspection as FAILED.
      - If there is no product (semi-finished product) available in factory, issue a MISSED REPORT.
elements.expectedResult:
Quantity Ready and Packed should be matching the service type (100% / 80% for PSI - 20 % / 20% for DUPRO - 5% / 5% for IPC - ...)
Pls follow the below template on your comment.
XXXXPcs(XX%) Finished&Packed
XXXXPcs(XX%) Finished&Unpacked

zh.name: 可用数量检查：完成&包装&未包装
zh.expectedResult:
准备和包装的数量应与服务类型匹配（100% / 80%用于PSI - 20% / 20%用于DUPRO - 5% / 5%用于IPC - ...）
请按照以下模板在您的评论中填写。
XXXXPcs(XX%) 完成&包装
XXXXPcs(XX%) 完成&未包装
zh.instruction:
请以pcs和%输入完成并包装的总数量，以pcs和%输入完成但未包装的总数量。
如果产品未准备好进行验货：
- 检查可用产品和半成品，并询问工厂是否提供包装材料（如果可用）。
- 将验货标记为不通过。
- 如果工厂没有可用的产品（半成品），请发出放空报告。

elements.name: Available Quantity Check: Finished&Packed&Unpacked

elements.instruction:
Please fill in the quantity details for item/reference/sku available on-site. 
Please add inspected quantity and inspected number of cartons.

zh.name: 可用数量详情
zh.instruction:
请填写现场可用的项目/参考/SKU的数量详情。
请添加检查的数量和检查的纸箱数量。

elements.name: Available Quantity Details

elements.instruction:
Were you able to select the cartons / sampling size fully randomly ? 
If yes, the result is passed, If not, the result is failed.
elements.expectedResult:
1. Take a picture of the stacks of cartons before selection​
2. Choose cartons from every pallet/stack.​
3. Choose cartons from different parts of the stack (top, bottom, left, right, front, back, middle, inside), including not accessible cartons ​
4. Ask factory for support in moving the goods if they are not accessible​
5. Take a picture of the stack after the selecting the cartons, showing how the random selection was done. ​
6. Take a picture of all selected cartons​
7. Follow the cartons from the warehouse to the inspection area, make sure they are not tempered with.  ​
8. Add a remark in the report and inform back-office if you cannot proceed with the random carton selection, explaining the reason.

zh.name: 随机抽箱
zh.expectedResult:
1. 在选择之前拍摄纸箱堆的照片
2. 从每个托盘/堆中选择纸箱。
3. 从堆的不同部分（顶部、底部、左侧、右侧、前面、后面、中间、内部）选择纸箱，包括无法触及的纸箱
4. 如果货物无法接触，请向工厂寻求支持搬运货物
5. 在选择纸箱后拍摄堆的照片，显示随机选择是如何进行的。
6. 拍摄所有选定纸箱的照片
7. 跟踪纸箱从仓库到验货区域，确保它们没有被掉包。
8. 如果无法进行随机抽箱，请在报告中添加备注并通知办公室，说明原因。
zh.instruction:
您能否完全随机选择纸箱/抽样数量？
如果是，结果为通过；如果不是，结果为不通过。

Correct measurement and photography requirements

在评论中备注纸箱层数。
正确的测量和摄影要求

elements.name: Outer Packing: Assortment, Dimensions & Weight

elements.instruction: Perform a carton drop test on the export cartons. (Follow the client's specification, carried out on 3 cartons according to ISTA 1A procedure if no specified).
elements.expectedResult: Let the carton fall freely on each of its faces, 3 edges and 1 corner from the specified height (if not specified use: <10kg: 76cm; 10-19kg: 61cm; 19-28kg: 46cm; 28-45kg: 31cm; 45-68kg: 20cm).

zh.name: 纸箱摔箱测试
zh.expectedResult: 让纸箱自由落下，落在每个面、3个边和1个角，从指定高度（如果未指定，使用：<10kg: 76cm; 10-19kg: 61cm; 19-28kg: 46cm; 28-45kg: 31cm; 45-68kg: 20cm）。
zh.instruction: 对出口纸箱进行摔箱测试。（遵循客户的规格，按照ISTA 1A程序在3个纸箱上进行，如果未指定）。

elements.name: Carton drop test

elements.instruction:
1. Availability of Mold Prevention Unit

elements.name: Inner Packing & Unit Packing

elements.instruction:
Shake test - Only for products with blister package and shake by hand for the product before opening the blister.

To see: 1/If the products are coming out of the package or become misaligned. 
2/to confirm if the products are securely fastened

zh.instruction:
摇晃测试 - 仅适用于带有吸塑包装的产品，在打开吸塑包装之前手动摇晃产品。
查看：1/产品是否从包装中出来或变得不对齐。
2/ 确认产品是否安全固定。

elements.name: End workmanship

elements.instruction:
If the products are packed in pallet or display, please compare it with client's specification.
The pallet / display should be strong enough and in good condition to support the safety of goods during transportation.
elements.expectedResult: Remark any damage/wet found on site

zh.name: 托盘展示条件检查 - 测试
zh.expectedResult: 备注现场发现的任何损坏/潮湿
zh.instruction:
如果产品以托盘或展示形式包装，请与客户的规格进行比较。
托盘/展示应足够坚固，处于良好状态，以支持运输过程中货物的安全。

elements.name: Pallet Display Condition Check - Test

elements.instruction: Please put the picture by SKU by color which means that if there are 2 color of 1 SKU, you will need to put 2 picture in this section with SKU name in the caption accordingly.
elements.expectedResult:
Please check carefully the provided file like artwork etc. before the inspection. If there's any conversation record offered by the supplier, please put a screenshot and date record on the report.

For all items made from metal: 
1. Moisture will be checked for metal material products to measure the level and potential for rust or mildew to develop. 
2. Check product screws also (if the product is assembled), to verify that there are no rusted screws. 
3. If the products are not assembled, will check parts as well (ex. Pipes, components) to verify that there are no rusted parts).

zh.name: 产品样式与构造
zh.expectedResult:
请在验货前仔细检查提供的文件，如艺术品等。如果供应商提供了任何对话记录，请在报告中附上截图和日期记录。
对于所有金属制成的项目：
1. 将检查金属材料产品的湿度，以测量生锈或霉变的程度和潜力。
2. 还要检查产品螺丝（如果产品是组装的），以验证没有生锈的螺丝。
3. 如果产品未组装，将检查零件（例如管道、组件），以验证没有生锈的零件）。
zh.instruction: 请按SKU按颜色放置图片，这意味着如果1个SKU有2种颜色，您需要在此部分放置2张图片，并相应地在标题中标注SKU名称。

elements.name: Product Style & Construction

elements.instruction: Check that the colors are conform to the specifications from the client, and record the corresponding pantone code and / or deviation from the expected result.
elements.expectedResult:
If there is product pantone code on client’s specification, please do the product pantone code check.
Product shall be in the correct shade / color inside of the allowable 4-5 color shading range if no specification provided.

zh.name: 产品颜色规格检查
zh.expectedResult:
如果客户的规格上有产品潘通色号，请进行产品潘通色号检查。
如果没有提供规格，产品应在允许的4-5种颜色阴影范围内的正确色调/颜色。
zh.instruction: 检查颜色是否符合客户的规格，并记录相应的潘通色号和/或与预期结果的偏差。

elements.name: Product Color Specification Check

elements.instruction:
Check the logo according to the product specification:
1. Quality and design
2. Spelling
3. Font
4. Color
5. Dimension, positioning and alignment
elements.expectedResult: The logo should be of good quality, correct, complete, legible and not damaged compared to the specifications or the approval sample.

zh.name: 产品商标
zh.expectedResult: 商标应与规格或批准样品相比，质量良好、正确、完整、清晰且未损坏。
zh.instruction:
根据产品规格检查商标：
1. 质量和设计
2. 拼写
3. 字体
4. 颜色
5. 尺寸、定位和对齐

elements.name: Product Logo

elements.instruction:
1. Check that the specified labels are found attached to the product.
2. Check that the information of the label is correct to specifications.
elements.expectedResult:
Upload picture for all
- Markings / label / Hangtag on the product
- Label/marking on others accessories and components

1. All specified labels shall be present and attached correctly to the product.
2. The information on the labels shall be correct to specifications.
3. It should not have been modified by hand or with extra sticker.

zh.name: 产品标签
zh.expectedResult:
上传所有标签的照片
- 产品上的标记/标签/吊牌
- 其他配件和组件上的标签/标记
1. 所有指定标签应正确附着在产品上。
2. 标签上的信息应符合规格。
3. 不应手动修改或加贴额外的贴纸。
zh.instruction:
1. 检查指定标签是否附着在产品上。
2. 检查标签上的信息是否符合规格。

elements.name: Product Labels

elements.expectedResult:
Add scanning barcode result for each SKU in report.

Please take the product picture per SKU and attach it to the "Inspected product" in the "Detail tab" of the inspector APP. If there is a different color of one SKU, you need to take the picture for each color separately. Need to show in report pictures of all SKU checked

zh.name: 产品详情 - 条形码
zh.expectedResult:
在报告中添加每个SKU的扫描条形码结果。
请按SKU拍摄产品照片，并将其附加到验货员APP的“详情”选项卡中的“检查产品”中。如果一个SKU有不同的颜色，您需要分别拍摄每种颜色的照片。需要在报告中展示所有检查的SKU的照片。

elements.name: Product Details - Barcode

elements.instruction: Check the dimensions, shape, style or color of the product against the approval sample if it's on-site and take for pictures.
elements.expectedResult: The products should be matched with the approval sample, a detailed caption is needed on approval sample and the bulk products.

zh.name: 批准样品比较
zh.expectedResult: 产品应与批准样品匹配，批准样品和大货产品需要详细说明。
zh.instruction: 检查产品的尺寸、形状、样式或颜色与现场批准样品的对比，并拍摄照片。

elements.name: Approval Sample Comparison

elements.instruction: For products with manual/instructions sheet (home appliance, bath, lighting, furniture etc), please check if the IM matches with client's artwork.
elements.expectedResult: If not applicable, remark N/A

zh.name: 带手册或说明书的产品 - 测试
zh.expectedResult: 如果不适用，请备注N/A
zh.instruction: 对于带有手册/说明书的产品（家用电器、浴室、照明、家具等），请检查IM是否与客户的艺术品匹配。

elements.name: Products With Manual Or Instruction - Test

zh.name: 带手册或说明书的产品检查

elements.name: Products with Manual or Instruction Check

elements.instruction:
Compare actual dimensions vs customer's specifications & technical drawings. If no tolerances are provided by the customer, please follow +/- 5% tolerances as per QIMA Standards.
Check the general dimension and product weight if there are not specification client dimensions. 5pcs per item.
elements.expectedResult:
Pls upload the screenshot of the dimension chart.
Upload all pictures of measurements, measurement charts (excel) and screenshot of the measurement charts.
For the screenshot, use the spotlight feature to enlarge the screenshot in the final report.

comment.message: Some product dimensions and weight do not match the information provided by the customer

en.message: Some product dimensions and weight do not match the information provided by the customer.

zh.name: 产品尺寸结果
zh.expectedResult:
请上传尺寸表的截图。
上传所有测量的照片、测量图表（excel）和测量图表的截图。
对于截图，请使用突出显示照片功能在最终报告中放大截图。
zh.instruction:
比较实际尺寸与客户的规格和技术图纸。如果客户未提供公差，请遵循QIMA标准的±5%公差。
检查一般尺寸和产品重量，如果没有规格客户尺寸，则每个项目5个。

elements.name: Product Dimensions Result

elements.instruction:
Compare actual weight vs customer specifications & technical drawings. If no tolerances are
provided by the customer, please follow +/- 5% tolerances as per QIMA Standards.
elements.expectedResult: Pls upload the screenshot of the weight table.

comment.message: Some product dimensions and weight do not match the information provided by the customer

en.message: Some product dimensions and weight do not match the information provided by the customer.

zh.name: 产品重量结果
zh.expectedResult: 请上传重量表的截图。
zh.instruction: 比较实际重量与客户规格和技术图纸。如果客户未提供公差，请遵循QIMA标准的±5%公差。

elements.name: Product Weights Result

zh.name: 检查的总件数和纸箱已打开

comment.message: After inspection, the factory did not have enough personnel for packing

en.message: After inspection, the factory did not have enough personnel for packing.

elements.instruction: For E&E products (home appliance, bath, lighting etc), please take clear picture of plugs with legible markings for each reference checked.
elements.expectedResult: If not applicable, remark N/A

zh.name: 仅E和E产品检查
zh.expectedResult: 如果不适用，请备注N/A
zh.instruction: 对于E&E产品（家用电器、浴室、照明等），请为每个检查的参考拍摄清晰的插头照片，确保标记清晰可见。

elements.name: E And E Products Check Only

elements.expectedResult: Remark Special Request From Sale and the expected result

zh.name: 销售特别请求
zh.expectedResult: 备注销售特别请求及预期结果

elements.name: Special Request From Sale
Special Request From Sale In Charge

actions.instructions:
For TESTS, mandatory to have comments, photos, and result.
For DEFECTS, mandatory to always record by SKU.

zh.instructions:
对于测试，必须有评论、照片和结果。
对于缺陷，必须始终按SKU记录。

elements.instruction: Check the product from 1 m distance with adequate lighting for any differences or defects compared to specifications or approval sample.
elements.expectedResult: The product shall be to specifications or approval sample.

zh.name: 外观检查
zh.expectedResult: 产品应符合规格或批准样品。
zh.instruction: 从1米距离用适当的光线检查产品，与规格或批准样品进行比较，查看是否有任何差异或缺陷。

elements.name: Appearance check

elements.instruction:
1. Use a calibrated weight scale to measure the actual weight of the product against specifications or approval sample.
2. If not specified, the tolerance is ±5%.
elements.expectedResult: The weight shall be to specifications or approval sample within tolerances.

zh.name: 重量检查
zh.expectedResult: 重量应符合规格或批准样品的公差范围。
zh.instruction:
1. 使用校准的称重秤测量产品的实际重量，与规格或批准样品进行比较。
2. 如果未指定，公差为±5%。

elements.name: Weight check

elements.instruction:
1. Assemble the items according to the instruction manual or specifications.
2. Check all accessories.
elements.expectedResult:
1. The product can be assembled or disassembled.

2.The product or parts shall fit without having to be forced together.

3. No gap or within tolerances, good alignment between parts.

zh.name: 组装测试
zh.expectedResult:
1. 产品可以组装或拆卸。
2. 产品或部件应能无须强行组合而适配。
3. 部件之间无缝隙或在公差范围内，良好的对齐。
zh.instruction:
1. 按照说明手册或规格组装物品。
2. 检查所有配件。

elements.name: Assembly test

elements.instruction: Repeatedly use the product and its adjustable parts to the full extent of their capacity for 20 cycles with the force by hand, or following the client specifications if there is any.
elements.expectedResult: The product or part shall not break, deform or be damaged in anyway after use; it should still function normally, without any loss.

zh.name: 疲劳测试
zh.expectedResult: 产品或部件在使用后不应断裂、变形或以任何方式受损；应仍能正常功能，无任何损失。
zh.instruction: 重复使用产品及其可调部件，充分发挥其能力进行20个循环，使用手动施加的力量，或按照客户的规格进行。

elements.name: Fatigue test

elements.instruction:
1. Place the product on a 10 degree incline plane.

2. Photograph the item on the incline or in the most unfavorable position.
elements.expectedResult: The product shall not be able to tip over.

zh.name: 平衡测试（稳定性）
zh.expectedResult: 产品不应倾倒。
zh.instruction:
1. 将产品放置在10度的倾斜平面上。
2. 拍摄物品在倾斜或最不利位置的照片。

elements.name: Balance test (stability)

elements.instruction:
1. The test should be conducted on the products which are made of paper, wood or board.
2. Check the moisture content of the item in 3 locations per product.
elements.expectedResult:
1. All points should be within the tolerances specified. 
2. If no tolerance is specified, use 7-12% for indoor products and 8-16% for outdoor products.

zh.name: 湿度测试（湿度水平）
zh.expectedResult:
1. 所有点应在指定的公差范围内。
2. 如果未指定公差，室内产品使用7-12%，室外产品使用8-16%。
zh.instruction:
1. 测试应在由纸张、木材或板材制成的产品上进行。
2. 在每个产品的3个位置检查物品的湿度。

elements.name: Moisture content test (humidity level)

elements.expectedResult:
The artwork, logo, marking or the area tested are completed and clear after the test.
There should not be any peeled off after the tape is removed, nor any color transferred onto the tape.

zh.name: 粘合剂测试
zh.expectedResult:
测试后的艺术作品、标志、标记或测试区域应完整且清晰。
移除胶带后不应有剥落，也不应有颜色转移到胶带上。
zh.instruction:
1. 确保测试前表面干净。
2. 使用一条压力敏感胶带（例如3M 500），将其牢固地应用于整个待测试区域：艺术作品、标志、标记或客户指定的区域；
3. 用手按压表面，以确保胶带牢固粘附，无气泡或皱纹；
4. 以接近60度的角度快速但不急促地在0.5-1秒内移除胶带。
5. 在同一区域重复此操作3次，使用的胶带应剪掉。

elements.name: Adhesive test

elements.expectedResult:
The marking, printing and logo should not be rubbed off, dimmed or illegible after the test. 
The cotton should be not stained.

zh.name: 摩擦（标记）测试
zh.expectedResult:
测试后标记、印刷和标志不应被擦掉、变暗或模糊。
棉花不应被污染。
zh.instruction:
1. 用干白棉布在10厘米的距离上摩擦标记或印刷10次。
2. 使用浸泡在纯净水中的白棉布重复测试；
3. 使用浸泡在石油醚或92-95%酒精中的白棉布重复测试。

elements.name: Rubbing (marking) test

elements.instruction:
1. Test the function of the product to the full extent of its capacities.
2. If available apply the instructions given in the client specifications or product documentations.
3. If the product includes components or accessories, each one must be tested and must come from the bulk production.
elements.expectedResult:
Product should function as intended and meet all client requirements.
Report any discrepancy.

zh.name: 功能测试
zh.expectedResult:
产品应按预期功能运作，并满足所有客户要求。
报告任何不一致之处。
zh.instruction:
1. 测试产品的功能，充分发挥其能力。
2. 如果可用，应用客户规格或产品文档中提供的说明。
3. 如果产品包括组件或配件，必须测试每个组件，并且必须来自大货生产。

elements.name: Function test

elements.instruction:
1. Check or test that the product and/or part can fit as expected.
2. If there is an approved sample, verify that the inter-compatibility between the approved sample and the tested products.
elements.expectedResult: The product should be correctly sized, balanced, and behave correctly.

zh.name: 适配检查
zh.expectedResult: 产品应正确尺寸、平衡，并正常工作。
zh.instruction:
1. 检查或测试产品和/或部件是否能按预期适配。
2. 如果有批准样品，验证批准样品与测试产品之间的互通性。

elements.name: Fitting check

elements.instruction:
Use calibrated pull gauge to press, pull and twist the product or part by the specified force and duration, following the client specifications. 
If there is no specified force and duration, please follow 30N±5 with 10s.
If no pull gauge available, perform by hand
elements.expectedResult: The product or part shall not detach, break, deform or be damaged in anyway after use.

zh.name: 强度测试（滥用测试）
zh.expectedResult: 产品或部件在使用后不应脱落、断裂、变形或以任何方式受损。
zh.instruction:
使用校准的拉力计按客户规格施加指定的力量和持续时间进行按压、拉扯和扭转产品或部件。
如果没有指定的力量和持续时间，请遵循30N±5，持续10秒。
如果没有拉力计，请用手进行。

elements.name: Strength test (abuse test)

elements.instruction:
1.Place the product on the flat surface and check it for any wobbling.
2.Push it with a force of 1-10N in four equal directions for 5 seconds, observing whether the product will shake or tilt.
elements.expectedResult:
1. The product should not shake or tilt.
2. Determine the results according to the tolerance required by the customer.
3. If the customer has no tolerance requirements, please judge based on the maximum shaking difference of 1mm.
4. If the factory is unable to provide tools or if the tools are not within their validity period, please make a remark in the report.

zh.name: 摇晃测试
zh.expectedResult:
1. 产品不应摇晃或倾斜。
2. 根据客户要求的公差确定结果。
3. 如果客户没有公差要求，请根据最大摇晃差异1mm进行判断。
4. 如果工厂无法提供工具或工具不在有效期内，请在报告中做备注。
zh.instruction:
1. 将产品放在平坦的表面上，检查是否有摇晃。
2. 用1-10N的力量在四个方向推5秒，观察产品是否会摇晃或倾斜。

elements.name: Wobbling test

elements.instruction:
Check the quantity and assortment in each package.
Record the assortment of the package (number of piece of each model, color, etc.)
Check 5 carton
elements.expectedResult: The quantity and assortment should match the expectations.

zh.name: 数量和混装检查（每个包装）
zh.expectedResult: 数量和混装应符合预期。
zh.instruction:
检查每个包装中的数量和混装。
记录包装的混装（每种型号、颜色的数量等）。
检查5个纸箱。

elements.name: Quantity and assortment check (per package)

elements.instruction:
1. Use scanner or phone APP and scan barcode.
2. Scan any barcode on the product and compare the results to the code under the barcodes (if any) and to the specifications.
elements.expectedResult:
1. Barcode must match the client's specifications.
2. It should be scannable and have the correct number.

zh.name: 条形码/二维码扫描测试
zh.expectedResult:
1. 条形码必须符合客户的规格。
2. 应可扫描并具有正确的编号。
zh.instruction:
1. 使用扫描仪或手机应用程序扫描条形码。
2. 扫描产品上的任何条形码，并将结果与条形码下的代码（如有）和规格进行比较。

elements.name: Barcode/QR code scanning test

elements.instruction:
1. Use a calibrated tool to measure the actual dimensions of the product against specifications or approval sample.
2. If not specified the product's tolerance is ±5%.

The points to measure are specified in the technical drawing or the client's requirements; if not take the general dimensions (width, length, height) and the dimension of connection/assembly points (location of assembly hole for instance).
elements.expectedResult:
The dimensions shall be to specification or approval sample within tolerances.
If not specified, the product's tolerance is ±5%.

zh.name: 尺寸检查
zh.expectedResult:
尺寸应符合规格或批准样品的公差范围。
如果未指定，产品的公差为±5%。
zh.instruction:
1. 使用校准工具测量产品的实际尺寸，与规格或批准样品进行比较。
2. 如果未指定，产品的公差为±5%。
测量点在技术图纸或客户要求中指定；如果没有，则取一般尺寸（宽度、长度、高度）和连接/组装点的尺寸（例如组装孔的位置）。

elements.name: Dimension check

defects.name: Scratches / scarring / gouge (MAJ)
defects.description: The product contains scratches or scarring visible from 1m away.

zh.name: 划痕 / 伤痕 / 凹痕（重要）
zh.description: 产品表面有划痕或伤痕，从1米远可见。

defects.name: Wrong style
defects.description: The style isn't to specifications or is changed from the approval samples.

zh.name: 风格错误
zh.description: 风格不符合规格或与批准样品有所更改。

defects.name: Scratches / scarring / gouge (MIN)
defects.description: The product contains scratches or scarring only visible less than 1m away.

zh.name: 划痕 / 伤痕 / 凹痕（轻微）
zh.description: 产品表面有划痕或伤痕，仅在距离小于1米时可见。

defects.name: Cracks (MAJ)
defects.description:
1. The product's surface or part contains a crack visible from the observatory length 
2. The crack is in a position to compromise the product's solidity. 
3. The product contains multiple cracks.

zh.name: 裂缝（重要）
zh.description:
1. 产品表面或部件有从观察距离可见的裂缝。
2. 裂缝的位置会影响产品的牢固性。
3. 产品有多个裂缝。

defects.name: Dent (MIN)
defects.description: The product contains a dent in an otherwise unobvious position (hidden) or only visible less than 1m away.

zh.name: 凹痕（轻微）
zh.description: 产品表面有凹痕，位置不明显（隐藏）或仅在距离小于1米时可见。

defects.name: Cracks (MIN)
defects.description: The product's surface or part contains a crack only visible less than 1m away.

zh.name: 裂缝（轻微）
zh.description: 产品表面或部件有裂缝，仅在距离小于1米时可见。

defects.name: Flash / burr on the product (MAJ)
defects.description: The product is not well finished and presents flash or burrs visible at more than 1m.

zh.name: 产品上的毛刺/边缘（重要）
zh.description: 产品的表面处理不佳，存在从1米以上可见的毛刺或边缘。

defects.name: Flash / burr on the product (MIN)
defects.description: The product is not well finished and presents flash or burrs visible only at less than 1m.

zh.name: 产品上的毛刺/边缘（轻微）
zh.description: 产品的表面处理不佳，存在仅在距离小于1米时可见的毛刺或边缘。

defects.name: Surface marks (MIN)
defects.description: The product contains burn marks, press marks, compression marks, washing / brush marks, (feel of an orange peel), position markers, finger prints, or other aesthetic marks only visible less than 1m away.

zh.name: 表面痕迹（轻微）
zh.description: 产品表面有烧痕、压痕、压缩痕迹、洗刷痕迹（有橘子皮的感觉）、位置标记、指纹或其他仅在距离小于1米时可见的美观痕迹。

defects.name: Poor assembly / construction
defects.description:
1. The product or parts (assembly) is not fitting well together or has to be forced together.
2. There are gaps in between parts where there shouldn't be.

zh.name: 组装/构造不良
zh.description:
1. 产品或部件（组装）无法良好结合或必须强行结合。
2. 部件之间存在不应有的缝隙。

defects.name: Surface marks (MAJ)
defects.description: The product contains burn marks, press marks, compression marks, washing / brush marks, position markers, finger prints, or other aesthetic marks visible from 1m away.

zh.name: 表面痕迹（重要）
zh.description: 产品表面有烧痕、压痕、压缩痕迹、洗刷痕迹、位置标记、指纹或其他从1米远可见的美观痕迹。

defects.name: Dirt marks (MIN)
defects.description:
1. The product contains dirt marks only visible less than 1m away.
2. The dirt mark is equal or smaller than 2cm.

zh.name: 污垢痕迹（轻微）
zh.description:
1. 产品表面有污垢痕迹，仅在距离小于1米时可见。
2. 污垢痕迹的大小等于或小于2厘米。

defects.name: Wrong or weak junction
defects.description: The junction does not match the specification or is weak and prone to breakage.

zh.name: 错误或弱连接
zh.description: 连接不符合规格或较弱，容易断裂。

defects.name: Malfunction or no function
defects.description: The item does not function or not as expected.

zh.name: 故障或无功能
zh.description: 物品无法正常工作或未按预期工作。

defects.name: Dent (MAJ)
defects.description: The product contains a dent in an obvious position and can be clearly seen from more than an arm's length away

zh.name: 凹痕（重要）
zh.description: 产品表面有明显的凹痕，距离超过手臂长度可清晰看到。

defects.name: Sharp points / edges
defects.description:
The product contains any non-functional, non-specified sharp extremity that can potentially cause harm. 

This include any protruding nail, screw or staple.

zh.name: 锋利的点/边缘
zh.description:
产品存在任何非功能性、未指定的锋利尖端，可能导致伤害。
包括任何突出钉子、螺钉或订书钉。

defects.name: Stain / streaks (MIN)
defects.description: The product contains stains or streaks not specified only visible less than 1m away.

zh.name: 污渍/条纹（轻微）
zh.description: 产品表面存在未指定的污渍或条纹，仅在距离小于1米时可见。

defects.name: Stain / streaks (MAJ)
defects.description: The product contains stains or streaks not specified visible from 1m away.

zh.name: 污渍/条纹（重要）
zh.description: 产品表面存在未指定的污渍或条纹，从1米远可见。

defects.name: Deformation / Different Shape
defects.description: The shape / form is different to the approval sample only visible less than 1m away.

zh.name: 变形/形状不同
zh.description: 形状/外观与批准样品不同，仅在距离小于1米时可见。

defects.name: Deformation / Different Shape
defects.description: The shape / form is different to the specification or approval samples visible from 1m away.

zh.name: 变形/形状不同
zh.description: 形状/外观与规格或批准样品不同，从1米远可见。

elements.instruction:
Please confirm the factory location is the same as booked by the client. 
Note: if goods at another supplier's location (within a 5-15 minute walk) are still subject to inspection, proceed as usual. Include the location in the report and notify the back office.

zh.name: 工厂/车间位置是否与预定相同？
zh.instruction:
请确认工厂位置是否与客户预定的相同。
注意：如果货物在其他供应商的位置（步行5-15分钟内）仍需进行检查，请照常进行。将该位置包括在报告中，并通知办公室。

elements.name: Is the factory/workshop location same as booked?

zh.name: 工厂合作、组织和清洁度

elements.instruction: Please confirm the lighting & cleanliness conditions in the inspection room. Make a remark if you find it dirty.
elements.expectedResult: Record and upload a picture of inspection room.

zh.expectedResult: 记录并上传检查室的照片。
zh.instruction: 请确认检查室的照明和清洁条件。如发现脏乱，请做备注。
zh.name: 检查室照明及清洁条件

elements.name: Inspection Room Lighting & Cleanliness Conditions

elements.instruction: (In case the inspection takes place outside of the factory (warehouse for example) the inspector must ask to see the production line to take pictures and in case the supplier refuse, must explain what happened in the report)
elements.expectedResult:
Take photos of the Production Lines every time even if the product is done 100%.

Production line 1
Production line 2
...

zh.name: 工厂的生产线
zh.expectedResult:
每次拍摄生产线的照片，即使产品已完成100%。
生产线1
生产线2
...
zh.instruction: （如果检查发生在工厂之外（例如仓库），检查员必须要求查看生产线以拍照，如果供应商拒绝，必须在报告中解释发生了什么）

elements.name: Production line of factory

elements.instruction: Were the tools provided by the factory calibrated?

zh.name: 工具校准
zh.instruction: 工厂提供的工具是否经过校准？

elements.name: Tools calibration

elements.instruction: Note: If the vendor information (address already in IP) is not the same that the factory information (address where inspection took place) the inspector should make a clear "important remark" about it.

zh.name: 工厂电子邮件
zh.instruction: 注意：如果供应商信息（地址已在IP中）与工厂信息（检查发生的地址）不同，检查员应对此做出明确的“重要备注”。

elements.name: Factory Email

elements.instruction: Inspector input manually in English

zh.name: 工厂员工人数
zh.instruction: 检查员手动输入英文

elements.name: Factory number of employees

elements.instruction: Inspector input manually in English

zh.name: 他们声称与供应商的关系是什么？
zh.instruction: 检查员手动输入英文

elements.name: Which Relationship they claim to have with vendor?

elements.instruction: Please record the actual factory name

zh.name: 工厂名称（英文）
zh.instruction: 请记录实际工厂名称

elements.name: Factory Name in Chinese

elements.instruction: Factory Disclaimer, Draft Report, and COC must be signed by inspectors and factory representatives. Pictures of the signed documents must be provided.

zh.name: QIMA文件是否已签署？
zh.instruction: 工厂免责声明、草稿报告和COC必须由检查员和工厂代表签署。必须提供签署文件的照片。

elements.name: Are the QIMA documents signed?

zh.name: 工厂免责声明、草稿报告和COC

elements.name: Factory Disclaimer, Draft Report and COC

actions.text:
Issued by QIMA Inspection (Shenzhen) Limited
Reviewed by Joseph Wang

THE ABOVE RESULT(S) REFLECT(S) QIMA LIMITED’S FINDINGS AT THE TIME AND PLACE OF INSPECTION. THIS REPORT DOES NOT RELEASE THE BUYER OR SELLER FROM CONTRACTUAL RESPONSIBILITIES, NOR DOES IT PREJUDICE THE BUYER’S RIGHT OF CLAIM TOWARD THE SELLER/SUPPLIER FOR COMPENSATION FOR ANY APPARENT AND/OR HIDDEN DEFECTS NOT DETECTED DURING INSPECTION OR OCCURRING ANYTIME THEREAFTER.

globalRemark.message:
1.For item 1146477, actual 24pcs per carton instead of 3pcs per carton.
2.For item 1146482 and 1146483, the actual “D” and “F” height is different from the assembly manual 
3.For item 1146477, actual printed “WHIT’’ on the shipping mark instead of “WHITE’’
4. No reference samples available
5. Some product dimensions and weight do not match the information provided by the customer 
6. The outer carton dimensions and weight do not match the information provided by the customer

en.message:
1. For item 1146477, actual 24pcs per carton instead of 3pcs per carton.
2. For item 1146482 and 1146483, the actual “D” and “F” height is different from the assembly manual.
3. For item 1146477, actual printed “WHIT” on the shipping mark instead of “WHITE.”
4. No reference samples available.
5. Some product dimensions and weight do not match the information provided by the customer.
6. The outer carton dimensions and weight do not match the information provided by the customer.

defectsFound.name: Scratches / scarring / gouge (MIN)
defectsFound.description: The product contains scratches or scarring only visible less than 1m away.

zh.name: 划痕 / 伤痕 / 凹痕（轻微）
zh.description: 产品表面有划痕或伤痕，仅在距离小于1米时可见。

defectsFound.name: Flash / burr on the product (MIN)
defectsFound.description: The product is not well finished and presents flash or burrs visible only at less than 1m.

zh.name: 产品上的毛刺/边缘（轻微）
zh.description: 产品的表面处理不佳，存在仅在距离小于1米时可见的毛刺或边缘。

defectsFound.name: Surface marks (MIN)
defectsFound.description: The product contains burn marks, press marks, compression marks, washing / brush marks, (feel of an orange peel), position markers, finger prints, or other aesthetic marks only visible less than 1m away.

zh.name: 表面痕迹（轻微）
zh.description: 产品表面有烧痕、压痕、压缩痕迹、洗刷痕迹（有橘子皮的感觉）、位置标记、指纹或其他仅在距离小于1米时可见的美观痕迹。

defectsFound.name: Dirt marks (MIN)
defectsFound.description:
1. The product contains dirt marks only visible less than 1m away.
2. The dirt mark is equal or smaller than 2cm.

zh.name: 污垢痕迹（轻微）
zh.description:
1. 产品表面有污垢痕迹，仅在距离小于1米时可见。
2. 污垢痕迹的大小等于或小于2厘米。

customField.label: QSP Product Name
customField.placeholder: Please copy and paste the QIMA product name from SSO in this field only when it’s needed.
